name: 10p15_IDI1_SD
description: 10p15.3 segmental duplication block surrounding IDI1 (isopentenyl-diphosphate delta-isomerase 1) and the WDR37/ADARB2 distal subtelomeric flank. Contains intrachromosomal duplicons paired with IDI2 and short pericentromeric SD copies; part of the 10p subtelomeric SD cluster shared with other subtelomeres.

architecture.internal_structure: 10-30 kb duplicons at 93-97% identity between IDI1 and IDI2 paralog; subtelomeric blocks shared with other chromosome ends.
